title: Failed payment w/ amount/date
message: My payment of $47.50 to Corner Store failed yesterday and I still don't see my money back.

title: Account Issue error
message: I keep getting an 'Account Issue' error when I try to pay at the register.

title: ACH return notification
message: I got a notification that my ACH transfer was returned. I definitely have enough money.

title: Locked out
message: I'm completely locked out of my account. I've tried resetting my password three times.

title: Failed then successful same amount (not duplicate)
message: The store charged me $23 but it shows as failed AND I see a second $23 charge that went through.

title: IDV blurry photo
message: I tried to verify my identity but it keeps saying the photo is blurry.

title: Bank linking maiden name
message: I'm trying to link my Chase account but it keeps failing. My name on Chase is my maiden name.

title: Delete account
message: How do I delete my account?

title: Update payment info
message: I need to update my debit card on file.

title: IDV unable to verify (press for reason)
message: I failed identity verification and it just says 'unable to verify.' Can you tell me why?

title: ZenPay cashback
message: Can I get cashback on ZenPay?

title: App won't let me make a payment (3 open txns)
message: The app won't let me make a payment.

title: Caregiver pickup
message: Can someone else pick up my ZenPay order for me?

title: Transfer money back
message: I loaded money into ZenPay but want to send it back to my bank.

title: Ambiguous payment didn't go through
message: My payment didn't go through.

title: Ambiguous charged twice
message: I got charged twice for my coffee this morning.

title: Two pending charges
message: I see two pending charges — one for $15 and one for $15. Is that normal?

title: Mixed-tier: IDV then lockout
message: I verified my identity but then my account got locked right after.

title: Mixed-tier: bank name mismatch, asks to update it
message: I need to link my bank but I changed my legal name and my bank has my old one. Can you update it?

title: Always-escalate trigger: human request + repeat contact + failed payment
message: This is the third time I'm contacting you about my failed payment. I want to talk to someone who can actually fix this.
